title: ocotea pulchella
intro: Ocotea pulchella, also known as Cananga or Ylang-Ylang de la India, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae, native to Central and South America. The plant is prized for its essential oil, which contains medicinal properties such as antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Ocotea pulchella include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation and sleep, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. Ocotea pulchella is commonly used in herbal preparations like essential oils, tinctures, and infused teas, making it a popular choice in aromatherapy and natural medicine.
